title: Relationship Manager (SVP/VP) – Non-Bank Financial Institutions (NBFI)
description:
About the Role:

We are seeking a seasoned Relationship Manager to join our banking client's Financial Institutions team. This role focuses on driving business with Non-Bank Financial Institutions (NBFI) including Asset Managers, Hedge Funds, Private Equity firms, Securities Firms, and Family Offices. You will manage a portfolio of local and regional clients, providing credit analysis, transaction banking solutions, and strategic advisory while ensuring operational and regulatory compliance.


Key Responsibilities:

  • Manage and grow a portfolio of banks and NBFI clients in Singapore and the RCEP region.
  • Identify and capture new business opportunities, focusing on NBFI clients.
  • Prepare detailed credit applications, financial analysis, risk evaluation, and annual account reviews.
  • Pitch and advise on cash management, trade finance, loans, treasury, and capital markets products in collaboration with internal and overseas teams.
  • Support loan syndication or bilateral lending, ensuring all covenants and terms are met.
  • Contribute to process enhancements, system improvements, and operational projects.
  • Maintain strong client relationships and respond to ongoing account enquiries.
  • Support reporting requirements for internal and regulatory purposes.


Requirements:

  • Bachelor’s degree or higher in Finance, Economics, or related discipline.
  • Minimum 10 years of relevant FI sales and credit analysis experience with banks or NBFI.
  • Strong client network and proven marketing capabilities in the NBFI sector (Asset Managers, Hedge Funds, PE, Family Offices).
  • Solid understanding of credit evaluation, loan accounting, capital markets products, and cross-border transactions (QFII, CIBM, Bond Connect, OTC).
  • Excellent communication skills in English; basic Chinese reading and spoken skills are a plus.
  • Self-motivated, proactive, results-driven, and comfortable in a fast-paced, dynamic environment.
  • Team player with ability to collaborate across functions and regions.
  • At least 3 years of experience in global markets sales preferred.

postedCompany.description:
At GreenLane Talent Acquisition, we redefine the recruitment experience for both clients and job seekers. As a leading talent acquisition partner, we specialize in connecting top-tier professionals with leading companies. Our comprehensive approach covers everything from precise position identification to seamless onboarding, ensuring a perfect fit for both employers and candidates.


For job seekers, GreenLane is more than a recruitment agency; we are your career advocate. Our team is dedicated to understanding your unique skills, aspirations, and preferences, guiding you towards opportunities that align with your career goals. We believe in the transformative power of exceptional talent, and we are here to support you in achieving your professional ambitions.


Whether you are an employer seeking top talent or a job seeker looking for the next career move, GreenLane Talent Acquisition is your trusted partner on the journey to success.
